class.name: SpinePhysicsConstraintPose
class.brief_description: Stores a pose for a physics constraint.
class.description: Stores the current pose values for a physics constraint, including physics properties like inertia, strength, damping, mass, wind, and gravity.

method.name: get_inertia
method.description: Returns the inertia value for the physics constraint.

method.name: set_inertia
method.description: Sets the inertia value for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_strength
method.description: Returns the strength value for the physics constraint.

method.name: set_strength
method.description: Sets the strength value for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_damping
method.description: Returns the damping value for the physics constraint.

method.name: set_damping
method.description: Sets the damping value for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_mass_inverse
method.description: Returns the inverse mass value for the physics constraint.

method.name: set_mass_inverse
method.description: Sets the inverse mass value for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_wind
method.description: Returns the wind value for the physics constraint.

method.name: set_wind
method.description: Sets the wind value for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_gravity
method.description: Returns the gravity value for the physics constraint.

method.name: set_gravity
method.description: Sets the gravity value for the physics constraint.

method.name: get_mix
method.description: Returns a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained poses.

method.name: set_mix
method.description: Sets a percentage (0-1) that controls the mix between the constrained and unconstrained poses.
